Nazmul Haque Sajol

WordPress Developer

With over 8 years of experience crafting digital experiences, I specialize in custom WordPress themes, performance optimization, and building websites that convert. Let's bring your vision to life.

Hire Me on Upwork Connect on LinkedIn

Expertise

Here's what I specialize in

⚡

WordPress Development

Building robust, scalable websites on WordPress - the platform that powers 40% of the internet. From custom themes to complex functionality.

🎨

Custom Theme & Plugin Development

Creating bespoke WordPress themes and plugins tailored to your specific needs. No compromises on design or functionality.

🔒

Website Security

Hardening websites against threats - malware, hackers, and data breaches. Your data and reputation are safe with me.

🚀

Performance Optimization

Making websites blazing fast. Better Core Web Vitals mean better SEO, higher engagement, and more conversions.
